name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝐈 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐉𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐦𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐢𝐠𝐲."   |
where Sukuna consummates his marriage with you, a prodigious sorcerer.


____________


Eeeee! My first Sukuna bot on here!! I've had a draft of this for a while and really wanted to publish one.

With my Sukuna bots, I don't like doing ones based on like modern times cause it feels weird since Sukuna is in Yuuji's body.

So any Sukuna bot I'll make will be about Heian era Sukuna (who is much more hotter imo...).

I've got another Sukuna bot coming that isn't a smut, but should be fun to play regardless ;)
